sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 12:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 12:1
items.html: The Sefirot of the circles are called wheels because the lights become circular in them. This means that it is impossible to distinguish refinement and coarseness in them.
